name: Scallops and Pears with Fettucine in a Garlic Cream Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pan, sauté garlic in butter and sesame oil over medium heat until it just starts to become translucent, about 2 minutes.
2. Add scallop slices and continue sautéing, stirring or shaking the pan frequently, until the scallops turn white and opaque – about 2-3 minutes. Remove scallops and set aside.
3. Cook Fettuccine according to package instructions until al dente.
4. In the same pan, turn the heat to high. Add wine and lemon juice. Reduce the liquid by about half.
5. Stir in pear, cream, lemon verbena, and ginger juice. Cook briefly to thicken the sauce slightly and blend flavors.
6. Stir in scallops and heat through. Remove lemon verbena and adjust seasonings with pepper to taste.
7. Pour the sauce over Fettuccine and toss gently, coating the pasta evenly while keeping the scallops and pears on top. Serve hot.
